data.title: ARGAN and WDP in €13bn merger to forge European logistics champion
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

ARGAN SA ( (FR:ARG) ) just unveiled an announcement.

ARGAN and Belgian logistics landlord WDP have agreed a friendly share‑for‑share merger that will create one of Europe’s largest logistics property platforms, with €13 billion in assets, €700 million in annualised rental income and around 13 million m² of space across eight countries. The deal values ARGAN at a 21% total premium and includes an €11 per‑share exceptional distribution, positioning the combined group as the top logistics property player in Western Europe.

The merger will form a €5 billion fully integrated logistics platform in France built on ARGAN’s strong local brand and network, while doubling ARGAN’s investment pace via a sizeable land bank and combined self‑financing capacity of over €700 million a year. Management projects immediate accretion for WDP shareholders, enhanced dividends and liquidity for ARGAN investors, and largely neutral leverage, with family and institutional reference shareholders backing the transaction ahead of expected completion in early 2027.

The most recent analyst rating on (FR:ARG) stock is a Buy
with a EUR80.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ARGAN SA stock,
see the FR:ARG Stock Forecast page.

More about ARGAN SA

ARGAN SA is a leading French logistics real estate investment company, operating as a SIIC and focused on high‑quality warehouse and distribution assets. Together with Belgian peer WDP, it targets a broader European logistics market, leveraging a strong local footprint in France and a growing presence across Western Europe to serve major logistics and industrial tenants.

Average Trading Volume: 13,412

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €1.65B

For an in-depth examination of ARG stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: SL Green Realty posts wider loss, raises 2026 guidance
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

An announcement from SL Green Realty ( (SLG) ) is now available.

SL Green Realty reported a larger net loss for the quarter and six months ended June 30, 2026, with diluted EPS of ($0.38) in the second quarter versus ($0.16) a year earlier, while funds from operations came in at $1.43 per share, below the prior-year period that was boosted by one-time mortgage income. Despite softer year-on-year FFO, same-store cash NOI in Manhattan rose and office occupancy climbed to 94.7%, supported by robust leasing activity with significant rent mark-to-market gains.

The company executed a series of capital recycling moves in May 2026, selling the residential and retail portions of 7 Dey Street and a 49% joint venture interest in 346 Madison Avenue, and entering a contract to sell 10 East 53rd Street, collectively generating substantial cash proceeds earmarked partly for debt repayment. SL Green also continued to deploy capital through its $1.3 billion opportunistic debt fund and repurchased $14.1 million of common stock, while raising its 2026 FFO and net income guidance, signaling management’s confidence in improved operating income, incremental fee revenue and higher contributions from One Vanderbilt Avenue.

The most recent analyst rating on (SLG) stock is a Sell
with a $38.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SL Green Realty stock,
see the SLG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SLG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SLG is a Neutral.

SLG scores in the mid-range primarily due to weak profitability and elevated leverage despite improving revenue/margins and solid free cash flow. Technicals are moderately supportive with price above key moving averages and positive MACD, while valuation is mixed (high yield but negative P/E from losses). The latest earnings call was notably upbeat on leasing/occupancy momentum, but near-term cash flow pressure from leasing costs and the time needed to cover the dividend with FAD temper the outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on SLG stock,
click here.

More about SL Green Realty

SL Green Realty Corp., listed on the NYSE as SLG, is a real estate investment trust focused on owning, managing and leasing office properties in Manhattan, along with select retail and residential assets. The company also operates an opportunistic debt fund and engages in joint venture developments, positioning itself as a major player in New York City’s commercial office market.

Its portfolio strategy combines core office holdings, targeted property sales and structured debt investments to optimize cash flow and capital recycling. SL Green’s emphasis on Manhattan same-store performance, active leasing and partnerships with global developers underpins its role as a bellwether for the health of the city’s high-end office sector.

Average Trading Volume: 1,109,835

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $3.91B

Find detailed analytics on SLG stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Westamerica Bancorporation Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description:
SAN RAFAEL, Calif., Oct. 27, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) — The Board of Directors of Westamerica Bancorporation (NASDAQ: WABC) today declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.42 per share on common stock outstanding to shareholders of record at the close of business November 7, 2022. The dividend is payable November 18, 2022.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Chairman, President and CEO David Payne stated, “This quarterly dividend recognizes Westamerica’s reliable earnings stream, financial strength and conservative risk profile.”

On October 20, 2022, Westamerica reported $34.8 million in net income for the three months ended September 30, 2022, or $1.29 diluted earnings per common share.

Westamerica Bancorporation, through its wholly owned subsidiary, Westamerica Bank, operates banking and trust offices throughout Northern and Central California.

Westamerica Bancorporation Web Address: www.westamerica.com

For additional information contact:
Westamerica Bancorporation
1108 Fifth Avenue, San Rafael, CA 94901
Robert A. Thorson – SVP & Treasurer
707-863-6840
investments@westamerica.com

FORWARD-LOOKING INFORMATION:

The following appears in accordance with the Private Securities Litigation Reform Act of 1995:

This press release may contain forward-looking statements about the Company, including descriptions of plans or objectives of its management for future operations, products or services, and forecasts of its revenues, earnings or other measures of economic performance. Forward-looking statements can be identified by the fact that they do not relate strictly to historical or current facts. They often include the words "believe," "expect," "anticipate," "intend," "plan," "estimate," or words of similar meaning, or future or conditional verbs such as "will," "would," "should," "could," or "may."

Forward-looking statements, by their nature, are subject to risks and uncertainties. A number of factors — many of which are beyond the Company’s control — could cause actual conditions, events or results to differ significantly from those described in the forward-looking statements. The Company’s most recent reports filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission, including the annual report for the year ended December 31, 2021 filed on Form 10-K and quarterly report for the quarter ended June 30, 2022 filed on Form 10-Q, describe some of these factors, including certain credit, interest rate, operational, liquidity and market risks associated with the Company’s business and operations. Other factors described in these reports include changes in business and economic conditions, competition, fiscal and monetary policies, disintermediation, cyber security risks, legislation including the Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act of 2011, the Sarbanes-Oxley Act of 2002 and the Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act of 1999, and mergers and acquisitions.

Forward-looking statements speak only as of the date they are made. The Company does not undertake to update forward-looking statements to reflect circumstances or events that occur after the date forward looking statements are made.

The latest update is out from Telecom Italia SPA ( (IT:TIT) ).

Telecom Italia has disclosed a transaction by key manager for Public Affairs, Sabina Strazzullo, involving ordinary shares of the company traded on Borsa Italiana. The filing follows European market abuse regulations requiring managers to notify share dealings, reinforcing transparency around insider transactions.

Strazzullo executed a partial sale of 4,905 Telecom Italia ordinary shares at a price of €7.5997 to cover tax costs tied to the allocation of shares under the 2022-2024 stock option plan, as amended by shareholders in June 2025. The manager share sale is structured as a tax-related SellToCover operation and does not signal a broader change in Telecom Italia’s capital strategy or incentive scheme framework.

data.title: Santander UK Reshapes Executive Team to Drive TSB Integration and Payments Growth
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

An update from Santander UK ( (GB:SANB) ) is now available.

Santander UK has announced four senior appointments to its Executive Committee as it continues to integrate TSB and align its structure more closely with Banco Santander’s group model. The moves underscore a strategic focus on strengthening finance, compliance, and cards and payments leadership to support the bank’s ambitions to become one of the UK’s most substantial, competitive banks.

Tom Ranger will return as Chief Financial Officer from 1 October 2026, subject to regulatory approval, succeeding Angel Santodomingo, who will move to a role at Banco Santander in early 2027. Former deputy CFO Steve Affleck has been appointed Chief Accounting Officer with immediate effect, creating a dedicated accounting function that reports directly to CEO Mahesh Aditya.

The bank has named former WiZink Bank CEO Iñaki Perkins as Head of Cards & Payments and Executive Committee member, reflecting the growing strategic importance of payments in its UK offering. In addition, Barclays UK’s Chief Compliance Officer, Michael Christodoulides, will join Santander UK as Chief Compliance Officer from 1 November 2026, subject to regulatory approval, bolstering oversight as the bank navigates TSB integration and wider transformation.

Management highlighted that the refreshed leadership team is expected to enhance accountability, institutional knowledge, and alignment with the broader Santander group operating model. For stakeholders, the appointments signal a deliberate push to leverage the TSB acquisition to build a more integrated cards and payments franchise and to support sustainable growth while maintaining strong regulatory compliance and customer protection standards.

Spark’s Take on SANB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SANB is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial quality signals—especially several years of negative operating/free cash flow and rising leverage—despite positive reported profitability. Technicals also remain bearish with the stock below major moving averages and negative MACD. Offsetting these risks, the dividend yield is attractive, but valuation is hard to confirm because the P/E is not usable as provided.

To see Spark’s full report on SANB stock,
click here.

More about Santander UK

Santander UK is a major UK financial services provider offering a wide range of personal and commercial banking products through branches, telephone, mobile and online channels. It operates under full supervision of the Financial Conduct Authority and Prudential Regulation Authority, with eligible customer deposits protected by the Financial Services Compensation Scheme. Santander UK is part of Spain-based Banco Santander, one of the world’s largest commercial banking groups by market capitalization, which uses a global business model spanning retail and commercial banking, corporate and investment banking, wealth and insurance, and payments.

Average Trading Volume: 9,916

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: £178.8M

For a thorough assessment of SANB stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: ICFG Subsidiary InvesCore Posts Strong Half-Year Growth and Expands Sustainable Microfinance Reach
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

The latest update is out from Fintech Asia Limited ( (GB:ICFG) ).

ICFG’s principal subsidiary InvesCore NBFI JSC reported strong interim growth for the six months to 30 June 2026, with net interest income rising to US$32.0 million, a gross loan portfolio expanding to US$321.1 million and profit climbing to US$17.4 million. Total equity increased to US$108.0 million, and Central Asia operations doubled profits to US$1.2 million, reinforcing the group’s financial resilience in its core microfinance segment.

Operationally, InvesCore maintained its status as Mongolia’s largest NBFI and the fifth-largest in Kyrgyzstan, while celebrating its 10-year anniversary and surpassing US$4.65 billion in cumulative SME financing. Asset quality showed improving early delinquency trends despite a slightly higher non-performing loan ratio, and the group broadened its network with new centres in Ulaanbaatar and Khovd, launched a Green Growth Loan for women-led enterprises, and gained fintech recognition via Pocket NBFI’s finalist status at the Asia Fintech Awards 2026.

The report highlights InvesCore’s continued expansion and focus on sustainable, inclusive finance, which supports its market leadership in Mongolia and Central Asia and indicates ongoing demand for its microfinance services. For ICFG shareholders and stakeholders, the strong operational metrics and improving credit indicators suggest a solid foundation ahead of the parent group’s upcoming interim results, with regional growth and ESG-linked products likely to remain strategic priorities.

More about Fintech Asia Limited

ICFG Limited is an international financial services group listed in London, with its principal operations conducted through InvesCore NBFI JSC, an 82.59% owned subsidiary listed on the Mongolian Stock Exchange. InvesCore operates as the largest non-bank financial institution in Mongolia and a leading NBFI in Central Asia, focusing on microfinance and lending to small and medium-sized enterprises across Mongolia and the Kyrgyz Republic.

Over its decade of activity, InvesCore has built a sizable loan portfolio and equity base while disbursing billions of dollars in financing to more than 13,000 SMEs. The group continues to expand its nationwide and regional service network, and pursues sustainable finance initiatives, including tailored products for women-owned businesses, underscoring its role in inclusive economic development in its core markets.

Average Trading Volume: 18,088

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £25.49M

data.title: Aurea SA posts H1 revenue growth on Q2 commodity rebound, keeps cautious outlook
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Aurea SA ( (FR:AURE) ) has shared an update.

Aurea SA reported a 6% rise in first‑half 2026 revenue to €107.8 million, driven by a strong second‑quarter rebound in a more favorable commodity environment. The metals and alloys division benefited from higher aluminum prices and improved scrap dynamics linked to disruptions in Middle Eastern supply and transatlantic trade, while petroleum derivatives recovered on the back of rising oil prices, offsetting a weak first quarter.

Performance was uneven across segments, with rubber and developments suffering from operational issues at ROLL GOM and META REGENERATION, and chemistry and pharmaceuticals showing modest growth largely thanks to RVA amid ongoing international uncertainty. The preventive closure of cadmium recycler FLAUREA CHEMICALS under new regulatory standards illustrates regulatory pressure on specialized recycling, and Aurea is maintaining a cautious outlook for the second half while focusing on operational improvements, portfolio rationalization and selective M&A and disposals to support long‑term value creation.

More about Aurea SA

Aurea SA is a European industrial group specializing in waste regeneration and circular economy solutions. The company operates leading positions in aluminum alloys in France and the U.K., copper atomization and copper‑based alloys, recycled banded wheels from used tires, regeneration of used engine oils, and treatment of mercury‑containing waste, and is listed on Euronext Paris.

Through its diversified divisions in metals and alloys, petroleum derivatives, rubber products, and chemistry and pharmaceuticals, Aurea converts various waste streams into renewed raw materials for industrial customers. Its activities are closely tied to commodity markets, construction and public works, and specialized recycling niches, giving the group a broad exposure to economic and geopolitical cycles in Europe and beyond.

Aurea’s portfolio includes assets such as REGEAL in aluminum, EPR in waste oil and polluted water treatment, ROLL GOM in rubber, META REGENERATION in mercury waste, RVA and SARGON in chemical and pharma‑related activities, and the now‑closed FLAUREA CHEMICALS, previously the only European industrial cadmium recycler. The group pursues a strategy focused on operational performance, portfolio streamlining, and disciplined capital allocation.

Average Trading Volume: 714

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €48.69M

Find detailed analytics on AURE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Robertet Posts Modest Organic Growth Amid Currency Headwinds in First Half 2026
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Robertet ( (FR:RBT) ) has shared an announcement.

Robertet, a global leader in natural raw materials for fragrances, flavors and beauty ingredients, reported consolidated first-half 2026 revenue of €444 million, slightly down 0.5% from 2025 due mainly to adverse currency and scope effects. At constant exchange rates and scope, organic growth reached 2.8%, with strong performance from the Fragrances and Health & Beauty divisions offsetting declines in Raw Materials and modest weakness in Flavors.

The group’s Fragrances business grew 13% organically on strong demand from niche fine fragrance brands and new premium offerings, while Health & Beauty rose 11% thanks to expanded markets and enhanced scientific and commercial capabilities. Regional growth was driven by Latin America, boosted by a new São Paulo creation center, and Asia, supported by industrial investments in Indonesia and India, while Europe and North America remained subdued; Robertet is approaching the second half cautiously but continues to target around 5% organic growth for the full year at constant exchange rates and scope.

The most recent analyst rating on (FR:RBT) stock is a Hold
with a EUR888.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Robertet stock,
see the FR:RBT Stock Forecast page.

More about Robertet

Robertet is a France-based, mostly family-owned group founded in Grasse in 1850 and positioned as a world leader in natural products for fragrances, flavors and related ingredients. The company operates across more than 50 countries with around 2,700 employees, offering over 1,600 natural materials and bespoke products crafted in 18 global creation centers and generated revenue above €843 million in 2025.

Robertet is unique in the sector as a fully integrated fragrance, flavor and natural ingredient player, controlling the value chain from sourcing to final creation, which underpins its positioning in premium and niche markets. This integration, combined with its global footprint and focus on natural raw materials, supports its strategic expansion in high-growth regions and segments such as fine fragrances and health and beauty solutions.

Average Trading Volume: 1,159

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €1.59B

data.title: iPower advances AI strategy with GPU leasing deal
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

IPOWER ( (IPW) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On July 23, 2026, iPower Inc. announced it had signed a non-binding letter of intent with a prospective customer for the lease of dedicated high-performance GPU computer systems, marking a concrete step in its AI hardware leasing strategy. The initial deployment contemplates GPU equipment with an expected acquisition value of about $6 million to be leased over roughly 36 months following installation and acceptance.

Under the proposed arrangement, iPower or a designated subsidiary would acquire and retain ownership of the GPU systems, placing them in a mutually agreed data center and leasing them for the customer’s exclusive use, positioning the company to earn lease revenue from company-owned AI computing assets. The agreement could expand to an estimated $60 million in aggregate contract value if the initial phase is successfully executed, reinforcing iPower’s recently launched AI subsidiary and its strategic push into AI infrastructure, though all key commercial terms remain under negotiation and the non-binding LOI may not result in completed transactions or revenue.

Spark’s Take on IPW Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IPW is a Neutral.

The score is weighed down primarily by weak financial performance (sustained losses, contracting revenue, volatile cash flow, and KPI evidence of collapsing product revenue/gross profit) and strongly bearish technicals (price far below key moving averages with negative MACD). Corporate actions around financing and an AI strategy add some potential upside, but do not offset the current fundamental deterioration and downtrend. Valuation is also constrained by negative earnings and no indicated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on IPW stock,
click here.

More about IPOWER

iPower Inc. is a technology- and data-driven company operating at the intersection of AI infrastructure and real-world commerce. Building on its established e-commerce operations, proprietary technology platform and capital markets experience, the Nasdaq-listed firm is expanding into AI infrastructure investments and related financing ecosystems, targeting compute, data center and digital asset layers that underpin artificial intelligence.

iPower aims to participate in the growth of AI-related infrastructure through targeted investments in digital assets, infrastructure financing protocols and other AI opportunities. Leveraging operating experience and ecosystem relationships, the company is pursuing a scalable business model designed to generate durable long-term value for stockholders as it deepens its role in the AI hardware and compute-resource market.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Dr. Reddy’s Files Form 6-K on Publication of Q1 FY27 Unaudited Results
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Dr Reddy’s Laboratories ( (RDY) ) has provided an announcement.

On July 23, 2026, Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission and informed Indian and international stock exchanges that its unaudited financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2026 had been published in Business Standard and Andhra Prabha. The notice, signed by Company Secretary and Compliance Officer K. Randhir Singh, emphasizes regulatory compliance and transparent multi-jurisdictional disclosure, reinforcing the company’s governance standards even though specific financial figures were not included.

This filing signals Dr. Reddy’s commitment to meeting listing obligations across the NSE, BSE, NYSE and NSE IFSC and to keeping investors apprised of its quarterly financial reporting. By formally documenting the publication of its results in leading newspapers and on regulatory platforms, the company strengthens stakeholder confidence in its reporting processes and maintains its positioning as a well-governed pharmaceutical issuer in both Indian and global capital markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (RDY) stock is a Buy
with a $1540.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Dr Reddy’s Laboratories stock,
see the RDY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RDY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RDY is a Neutral.

RDY scores in the mid-range primarily due to solid underlying financial strength but a clear recent deterioration in margins/returns and higher debt. The technical picture is notably weak (price below key moving averages with negative MACD), which drags the score. Valuation is neither clearly cheap nor supportive via yield, while the earnings call adds a modest positive tilt from reiterated recovery guidance and product/regulatory progress, tempered by semaglutide disruption and regulatory/margin risks.

To see Spark’s full report on RDY stock,
click here.

More about Dr Reddy’s Laboratories

Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories Limited is a global pharmaceutical company headquartered in Hyderabad, India, focused on the development, manufacture and marketing of generic and branded medicines. The company is listed in India on the National Stock Exchange and BSE, and in the United States on the New York Stock Exchange, giving it broad access to domestic and international capital markets.

Dr. Reddy’s operates across multiple therapeutic segments and relies on timely financial reporting to maintain transparency with investors and regulators. Its multi-exchange listings reflect a strategy of serving both emerging and developed markets, where regulatory compliance and disclosure are central to sustaining investor confidence and supporting growth.

On July 23, 2026, Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission and notified Indian and international stock exchanges about newspaper advertisements of its unaudited financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. The results were published in Business Standard and Andhra Prabha, underscoring the company’s adherence to Indian listing disclosure rules and its effort to keep shareholders informed across jurisdictions.

The disclosure, signed by Company Secretary and Compliance Officer K. Randhir Singh, highlights the company’s focus on regulatory compliance and transparent communication rather than detailing the figures themselves. While no performance metrics were released in this notice, the formal multi-market intimation reinforces Dr. Reddy’s governance practices and supports stakeholder trust in its ongoing financial reporting processes.
